name: testing
context: Test frontend components: Vitest, React Testing Library, Playwright, accessibility audits
info: This skill covers testing frontend applications at every level: unit tests for utilities and hooks, component tests for React components with Testing Library, end-to-end tests with Playwright, and automated accessibility audits with axe-core. Vitest is the recommended test runner — it shares Vite's config and transforms, making it fast and zero-config for Vite projects. React Testing Library encourages testing behavior over implementation details. Playwright provides cross-browser E2E testing with auto-waiting and built-in assertions. Accessibility testing should be automated in CI — see [[frontend/accessibility]] for WCAG requirements.

sections.title: Unit tests
sections.body: Vitest for pure functions, custom hooks (with renderHook from Testing Library), and utility modules. Fast, isolated, no DOM needed for pure logic. Use vi.fn() for mocks, vi.spyOn() for spies. Test custom hooks from [[frontend/react#hooks]] and state stores from [[frontend/state]].

sections.title: Component tests
sections.body: React Testing Library renders components and queries by role, label, or text — not implementation details. Use userEvent for realistic interactions. Test what the user sees and does, not internal state. Wrap with providers if component uses context or state stores. See [[frontend/react#patterns]] for testable component patterns.

sections.title: End-to-end tests
sections.body: Playwright runs tests in real browsers (Chromium, Firefox, WebKit). Auto-waiting, built-in assertions, network interception, trace viewer. Test critical user flows: auth, checkout, form submissions. Run in CI on every PR. Use page.getByRole() and page.getByLabel() for accessible selectors — consistent with [[frontend/accessibility#semantic-html]].

sections.title: Accessibility testing
sections.body: Automate with @axe-core/playwright in E2E tests. Run axe with WCAG 2.1 AA tags on every page. Catches ARIA issues, missing labels, contrast failures. Complement with manual screen reader testing (VoiceOver, NVDA). See [[frontend/accessibility#testing-tools]] for the full tool list and [[frontend/accessibility#wcag-checklist]] for the compliance checklist.

sections.title: Test coverage
sections.body: Vitest v8 or istanbul coverage providers. Set thresholds in vitest.config.ts (aim for 80%+ on business logic). Reporter formats: text (terminal), html (visual), lcov (CI integration). Coverage measures lines, branches, functions, and statements. Focus on behavior coverage, not line count.

scripts.name: Run Tests
scripts.description: Execute the test suite with optional coverage and watch mode

TEST_COMMAND.description: Test command to execute (default: npx vitest run)

testPattern.description: Glob pattern to match test files (e.g. **/*.test.tsx)

watch.description: Whether to run in watch mode
